name: ManTech International Corporation
description: ManTech International Corporation is a leading provider of advanced technology services and solutions for the U.S. government, focusing on national security missions. The company specializes in delivering expertise in cyberspace superiority, data and artificial intelligence, digital transformation, and intelligent engineering. By supporting the Defense, Intelligence, and Homeland Security sectors, ManTech develops and deploys innovative technologies to help clients navigate complex challenges. With a deep commitment to mission success, the firm leverages its extensive experience to provide secure, mission-centric IT and engineering capabilities that protect the nation and ensure operational readiness.
